title: 10 Herbal Essential Oils For Baldness
description: Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils contains the bioactive constituents borneol, camphor, and alpha-pinene, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. These properties help to improve blood circulation to the scalp and reduce oxidative stress, which can contribute to hair loss. The antioxidant properties of Rosmarinus officinalis essential oils also help to protect the hair follicles from damage caused by free radicals. Additionally, the oil's anti-inflammatory properti...
